response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-03:31: Concert footage featuring the song 'ABOVE BELOW'. 2. 03:31-04:59: Live-action footage with the same song. 3. Used web search to confirm song title 'ABOVE BELOW' by 'Hololive English -Justice-' and retrieve full lyrics.
response.global_summary: A video featuring concert footage of Hololive English -Justice- followed by live-action domestic scenes, all set to their song 'ABOVE BELOW'.

scenes.description: Concert footage featuring Hololive English -Justice- members performing. The song 'ABOVE BELOW' is playing.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
don't, don't know me unpredictable
takin' you all below, takin' you all be-
don't don't know me, irresistible
takin' you all below, below we go

they wanna get down

you're never forgiven

not one to just forget
